briefdescription.para: Return the name for this catalog.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Namespace &ns, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &properties) override
memberdef.name: CreateNamespace

briefdescription.para: Create a namespace with associated properties.

parameterdescription.para: a key-value map of metadata for the namespace

simplesect.para: Status indicating success if created successfully; ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists if the namespace already exists; ErrorKind::kNotSupported if the operation is not supported

briefdescription.para: List child namespaces from the given namespace.

simplesect.para: a list of child namespaces; ErrorKind::kNoSuchNamespace if the given namespace does not exist

briefdescription.para: Get metadata properties for a namespace.

simplesect.para: a key-value map of metadata properties; ErrorKind::kNoSuchNamespace if the namespace does not exist

briefdescription.para: Drop a namespace.

simplesect.para: Status indicating success if dropped successfully; ErrorKind::kNoSuchNamespace if the namespace does not exist; ErrorKind::kNotAllowed if the namespace is not empty

briefdescription.para: Check whether the namespace exists.

simplesect.para: true if the namespace exists, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const Namespace &ns, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &updates, const std::unordered_set< std::string > &removals) override
memberdef.name: UpdateNamespaceProperties

briefdescription.para: Update a namespace's properties by applying additions and removals.

parameterdescription.para: a set of properties to add or overwrite
a set of property keys to remove

simplesect.para: Status indicating success if the update is successful; ErrorKind::kNoSuchNamespace if the namespace does not exist; ErrorKind::kUnsupported if the operation is not supported

briefdescription.para: Return all the identifiers under this namespace.

simplesect.para: a list of identifiers for tables or ErrorKind::kNoSuchNamespace if the namespace does not exist

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableIdentifier &identifier, const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const std::shared_ptr< PartitionSpec > &spec, const std::shared_ptr< SortOrder > &order, const std::string &location, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &properties) override
memberdef.name: CreateTable

briefdescription.para: Create a table.

parameterdescription.para: a location for the table; leave empty if unspecified
a string map of table properties

simplesect.para: a Table instance or ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists if the table already exists

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableIdentifier &identifier, const std::vector< std::unique_ptr< TableRequirement > > &requirements, const std::vector< std::unique_ptr< TableUpdate > > &updates) override
memberdef.name: UpdateTable

briefdescription.para: Update a table.

simplesect.para: a Table instance or ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists if the table already exists

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableIdentifier &identifier, const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const std::shared_ptr< PartitionSpec > &spec, const std::shared_ptr< SortOrder > &order, const std::string &location, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &properties) override
memberdef.name: StageCreateTable

briefdescription.para: Start a transaction to create a table.

parameterdescription.para: a location for the table; leave empty if unspecified
a string map of table properties

simplesect.para: a Transaction to create the table or ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists if the table already exists

briefdescription.para: Check whether table exists.

simplesect.para:
Result<bool> indicating table exists or not.
On success, the table existence was successfully checked (actual existence may be inferred elsewhere).
On failure, contains error information.

briefdescription.para: Drop a table.

detaileddescription.para: SqlCatalog currently removes only the catalog entry. Support for deleting table data and metadata files when purge is true is not implemented yet.

briefdescription.para: Rename a table.

simplesect.para:
Status indicating the outcome of the operation.
On success, the table was renamed.
On failure, contains error information.

briefdescription.para: Load a table.

simplesect.para: instance of Table implementation referred to by identifier or ErrorKind::kNoSuchTable if the table does not exist

briefdescription.para: Register a table with the catalog if it does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: the location of a metadata file

simplesect.para: a Table instance or ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists if the table already exists

memberdef.argsstring: (const SqlCatalogConfig &config, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > file_io, std::shared_ptr< CatalogStore > store)
memberdef.name: Make

briefdescription.para: Create a catalog backed by a user-supplied CatalogStore.

detaileddescription.para: This is the extension point for custom databases/drivers: implement CatalogStore and pass it here. The catalog initializes its schema (creating the backing tables if they do not exist) before returning.

parameterdescription.para: Catalog configuration (name and warehouse location are used; uri is informational because the store is already constructed).
File IO used to read and write table metadata files.
The catalog metadata store. Must not be null.

briefdescription.para: Create a catalog backed by the built-in SQLite client.

parameterdescription.para: uri is the SQLite database file path (or ":memory:").
File IO used to read and write table metadata files.

simplesect.para: A catalog instance, or ErrorKind::kNotSupported if the SQLite connector was not built.

briefdescription.para: Create a catalog backed by the built-in PostgreSQL (libpq) client.

parameterdescription.para: File IO used to read and write table metadata files.

simplesect.para: A catalog instance, or ErrorKind::kNotSupported if the PostgreSQL connector was not built.

briefdescription.para: Create a catalog backed by the built-in MySQL client.

parameterdescription.para: File IO used to read and write table metadata files.

simplesect.para: A catalog instance, or ErrorKind::kNotSupported if the MySQL connector was not built.

memberdef.argsstring: (SqlCatalogConfig config, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > file_io, std::shared_ptr< CatalogStore > store)
memberdef.name: SqlCatalog

briefdescription.para: Resolve the current metadata location for a table, or NoSuchTable.
Build a Table object from a metadata location.
SQL-backed Iceberg catalog.
